message:
fix(messaging): adapt rehearsal fork signer to steward_override + fix SublistLinkCache borrow

Two bugs found and fixed during deep cross-agent code review:

1. HIGH: cut.rs fork_rehearsal() re-issued the forked certificate with
   the original signer even when steward_override removed that signer,
   causing all replay operations to fail with SignerNotInStewardSet.
   Fix: adapt signer to first node in new steward set; also update
   active_sequencer when it falls outside the override set.
   Added EmptyStewardOverride error variant and 2 regression tests.

2. COMPILE: subject.rs SublistLinkCache::insert() was refactored by
   another agent to use Entry API, but the Vacant branch borrowed
   self.entries through the entry while also calling self.entries.len()
   and self.entries.remove(), violating the borrow checker. Reverted
   to contains_key() + separate insert pattern.

Also: deep first-principles audit of control.rs CRDTs (all merge ops
correct), service.rs obligation lifecycle (all paths sound), channel
mpsc drain removal (safe), pool timeout fix (slot reservation Drop
correct), TimeoutFuture repoll guard (correct).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
